title: Fix the Maximum Consecutive Sublist Sum

statement.markdown: Write a function that takes an array of integers as input and returns the maximum sum of a sublist that contains at least three elements. The sublist can be in any order within the input array. If no such sublist exists, return -1.
statement.outputFormat: The maximum sum of a sublist with at least three elements, or -1 if no such sublist exists
statement.notes: The input array will not be empty, and all elements will be integers.

examples.explanation: The maximum sum of a sublist with at least three elements is 1+2+3+4+5=15
The maximum sum of a sublist with at least three elements is -1-2-3=-6, but -3 has the maximum sum among all possible sublists with at least three elements
There is no sublist with at least three elements that sums up to a positive number

hints.text: Use Kadane's algorithm to find the maximum sum of a sublist

editorial.title: Editorial for Maximum Consecutive Sublist Sum
editorial.intuition: The idea is to find the maximum sum of a sublist by considering all possible sublists
editorial.bruteForce: We can use a brute force approach and calculate the sum of all possible sublists
editorial.betterSolution: Kadane's algorithm can be used to find the maximum sum of a sublist
editorial.optimalSolution: The optimal solution is to use Kadane's algorithm to find the maximum sum of a sublist
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: The proof of correctness is based on the fact that Kadane's algorithm finds the maximum sum of a sublist
